TaskDescription: Participants viewed prepared-food images one at a time and sorted each into one of two categories, meat or vegetarian, by pressing a key. The same set of 37 images was shown twice. A short eyes-open then eyes-closed resting baseline preceded the task. Response times were recorded.
Instructions: For each food image, press M if the food is meat or X if it is vegetarian.
StimulusCoding: stim_category is the displayed image's true category, coded m (meat) or v (vegetarian).
ResponseCoding: response_key is the physical key pressed: M (meat) or X (vegetarian). response is that key mapped to category (m/v) to compare with stim_category. accuracy=1 when they match.
EDFAnnotations: Event labels are embedded as EDF+ annotations: rest_eyesopen, rest_eyesclosed, categorize/meat, categorize/veg. The accompanying events.tsv holds the complete trial-level record (response, response time, accuracy).
